description_long: This is a cylindrical container of Venus Crema da Giorno, a daily moisturizing lotion. The container is made of a beige or off-white plastic with a slightly worn and aged appearance, featuring blue printed text and branding. The lid is flat, circular, and matches the body in color, likely a screw-on type, and shows some discoloration and surface wear. The front displays the Venus logo and product name, while the back contains usage instructions in both Italian and English. The overall surface is matte with some minor scuffs and stains, suggesting it has been handled or exposed to the elements. The container is compact and portable, suitable for personal care use in an urban environment.
description: A beige cylindrical plastic container of Venus Crema da Giorno lotion with blue branding and a matching flat lid, showing signs of wear and printed instructions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Venus logo, product name, and part of the blue printed text on a beige cylindrical body with a flat lid.
description_view_1: Side view with minimal visible text, highlighting the plain beige surface and the cylindrical shape of the container.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying detailed usage instructions in blue text, with the lid and body both showing signs of wear.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing partial text and the worn, slightly stained surface of the container.
